name: browser_playwright
description: Web browser automation using Playwright. Navigate, click, fill forms, scrape, screenshot.
author: JARVIS

commands.name: navigate
commands.description: Open a URL in the browser

commands.name: click
commands.description: Click an element on the page

commands.name: scrape
commands.description: Get visible text content from the page

url.description: URL to scrape (optional, uses current page if empty)

commands.name: screenshot
commands.description: Take a screenshot of the current page
